other_observers: Aaron Schippe , Jackie Heyda , Jeannie Mitchell , Brandon Percival , Bill Maynard.; Yes , I was the original finder.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch ,In the willow and cottonwood grove south of the Ranch HQ retention pond.
description: Small short tailed vireo with a dark stubby hooked bill. Yellow on throat and belly extending to vent area. Gray cap , whitish supercilium , dark line through eye and lores. Upper back and wings dark green-olive , no wings bars , although wing coverts had some paler fringes from fresh feathering .Behaviors: Actively feeding in Russian olives , subsequently moved south and observed in willow .Call: None heardPlumage: adult
